Extension to watch HBOMax in Picture in Picture mode. Enables a separate floating window to enjoy your favorite video content.

We're thrilled to present the latest update, where we've listened to your feedback and made it happen – introducing the much-anticipated Picture-in-Picture icon with subtitles support!

🌟 What's New:

New Picture-in-Picture Icon: Now you can enjoy uninterrupted viewing while diving into other tasks, all with the added bonus of subtitles!

Are you looking for a tool to watch HBOmax in a convenient always-on-top window? You’re in the right place! Focus on other tasks while watching your favorite series.

HBO Max Picture in Picture is perfect for multitasking, having something on in the background, or even working from home (we don’t advise sharing it with your boss though). 

There’s no need to stack multiple browser tabs anymore or to use other screens, it’s all fixed by this extension.

How does it work?
HBO Max Picture in Picture allows you to play video content in a floating window pinned always on top, so you can use the rest of your screen for other tasks. 

This extension adds an extra control button, which can be found among other viewing options (e.g. full-screen). Just click on it to launch a separate window with the show you’d like to watch and place it wherever you want, whether you're browsing your FB feed or preparing a business presentation.


All you need to do is add HBOMax Picture in Picture extension to your browser and enjoy your favorite series in the background. It's as simple as that!

This extension is part of the Quality Viewership Initiative, a collaborative effort to enhance the understanding of audience engagement. It collects anonymous, aggregated viewing insights to support creators and studios in improving the quality of their content. You can stop sharing your information at any time by switching the toggle on the options page.

Disclaimer: HBO is a trademark of Home Box Office, Inc.. This website & extension hold no association or affiliation with HBO Max or any third-party companies.

Fluany is a flashcards platform that helps you memorize and study anything. Quickly and easily while you do your work.

Fluany is a flashcards platform to memorize and study anything, fast and easy while you're surfing the Internet. With our extension, you have an incredible tool to improve your learning and consolidate your knowledge quickly and efficiently. With a minimalist and easy-to-use interface, fluany displays your flashcards in a New Tab, making your study more dynamic and interactive.

You can learn a lot while you work, or spend hours on social networks. Create your study lists, customize, add questions, terms or expressions you want to memorize, choosing the interval at which a question/term should appear for you. Friendly and intuitive interface. Start practicing in a few clicks.

Your time is precious and with fluany, you can study while you work, talk with your friends or even watching videos. The fluany enters into your routine forcing your mind to learn.

Join over 100K students using https://fluany.com
A fast, easy to use Solana wallet

Glow is the best way to get started with crypto on Solana. Solana is a super fast blockchain which resolves transactions in seconds without gas fees.

Glow gives you full control of your crypto. Unlike an exchange like Coinbase, you hold your secret keys. That means you have full control at your fingertips.

The Glow Browser Extension works by injecting a handler on webpages that allows you to interact with the website to sign in and approve transactions. You can buy NFTs, swap coins, play games, and try new experiences in the Solana ecosystem. 

We request permission to read and write to any webpage so that we can inject this handler on any webpage that wants to support Glow. But we take security seriously and do not store private user information on our servers or sell any data.

Adult / Porn Blocker, Block Sites - BlockGuard
Block Porn with our Porn Blocker that filters 3M+ adult sites using smart tech and custom block lists, keeping you safe.

✅ BlockGuard – The Best Porn Blocker, Adult Content Filter & Website Blocker for Chrome

BlockGuard is one of the best porn blockers for Chrome, designed to help you take full control of your online browsing. It combines powerful content filtering with smart productivity tools to keep you focused, avoid distractions, and build healthier digital habits.

With advanced blocking features and a privacy-first approach, BlockGuard is trusted by users seeking safer browsing and better digital discipline. It works as a porn blocker, adult content blocker, NSFW filter, and website blocker all in one simple and powerful extension.

Built for individuals, students, parents, and professionals, BlockGuard brings together essential tools that make it a preferred choice for users seeking reliable and customisable content control, while maintaining a privacy-first approach.

⚡ Block Porn, Adult Content & Online Distractions

BlockGuard blocks access to pornographic, adult, and NSFW websites using an intelligent filtering system. Focus Mode allows users to limit access to distracting websites during selected times, helping maintain productivity throughout the day.

With keyword-based blocking, users can restrict content related to explicit material, gambling, dating, social media, gaming, and more—simply by adding custom keywords or URLs.

🛡️ Features Users Value Most

✅ Porn Blocker & Adult Website Blocking
Blocks adult and explicit websites with options to add custom URLs for personalized protection.

✅ Adult Content Filter & Safe Search Enforcement
Enforces Safe Search across supported search engines to reduce exposure to explicit images, videos, and results.

✅ Keyword-Based Website Blocking
Block any website containing specific keywords such as “porn”, “NSFW”, “gambling”, “dating”, or custom terms.

✅ Whitelist Control
Instantly allow trusted websites if something important is blocked unintentionally.

✅ Browsing Insights & Digital Wellbeing
Helps users understand browsing habits and reduce distractions.

🚀 Advanced Controls That Users Appreciate

✅ Short-Form Content Blocking
Block platforms and features like YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, TikTok, and Facebook Reels.

✅ Usage Limits (Screen Time Control)
Set daily time limits for websites, with automatic blocking once limits are reached.

✅ Incognito Mode Support
Keeps blocking features active even during private browsing sessions.

✅ Custom Redirects & Motivational Messages
Redirect blocked pages to productive destinations or display motivational messages.

✅ Long Sentence Protection
Requires typing a full sentence before disabling protection, helping prevent impulsive actions.

✅ Email Partner Protection (Accountability Mode)
Adds an extra layer of control by requiring approval from an accountability partner before disabling key protections.

🌐 Privacy, Simplicity & Trust

✔ No tracking or selling of user data
✔ Flexible blocking by keywords, URLs, schedules, and limits
✔ Designed for productivity, parental control, and safer browsing
✔ Clean, simple, and easy-to-use interface

👥 Who Chooses BlockGuard?

✅ Parents looking for safer web access for children
✅ Students trying to reduce distractions
✅ Professionals improving focus
✅ Individuals building healthier online habits

🔍 Frequently Asked Questions

How to block porn on Chrome effectively?
-> Install BlockGuard and enable the "Adult Content Block" feature. It uses a real-time filtering system to identify and block adult websites automatically.

Can I block websites by keyword?
-> Yes. BlockGuard allows you to block websites by keyword such as “porn”, “NSFW”, or “gambling.” Any URL containing these terms will be restricted instantly.

Is there a way to stop NSFW content in search results?
-> BlockGuard includes Safe Search Enforcement, which filters out explicit images and videos from search engine results to ensure a cleaner browsing experience.

How can I limit time on websites or block distracting websites?
-> Use our Usage Limits feature to set daily time caps on specific sites. You can also use the website blocker for focus to restrict access to distracting platforms during work hours.

Does BlockGuard work as a parental control Chrome extension?
-> Absolutely. Parents use BlockGuard to block adult websites and create a safer web environment for children using custom whitelists and time limits.

Can I block YouTube Shorts and other short-form videos?
-> Yes, BlockGuard has a dedicated toggle to block YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Reels to help you avoid addictive "scroll traps."

🎯 Get Started with BlockGuard

Install BlockGuard from the Chrome Web Store and customize it to match your goals. Its combination of powerful tools, flexibility, and privacy-focused design makes it a popular choice among users who want greater control over their online experience.
치지직 파워(통나무) 자동 획득 및 파워 개수 표시

ProfilePro - AI SEO Tool for Google Business Profile SEO
Audit GMB SEO, automate GBP SEO tasks, optimize your GMB everywhere & crush competitors with this AI SEO tool without having to spy!

This extension is like ChatGPT for Google Business Profile (GMB) SEO.

Audit GMB SEO, automate GBP SEO tasks, optimize your GMB everywhere & crush competitors with this AI SEO tool without having to spy!

Revolutionize your Google Business Profile (GBP) SEO with ProfilePro, the state-of-the-art AI Chrome extension by Merchynt. Drawing on our extensive local SEO expertise, gained from assisting over 50,000 businesses, ProfilePro is the ultimate solution for automating and enhancing your Google Business Profile, formerly known as Google My Business (GMB).

Effortlessly Optimize Your Google Business Profile

ProfilePro's AI-driven features streamline your local SEO efforts, saving you time and money on expert SEO consultations and GBP management services. 

With just a few clicks, ProfilePro will:

- Perform automated keyword research tailored for your Google Business Profile
- Recommend an SEO-optimized business description for your business
- Suggest the best business categories for your GBP
- Generate one-click responses to your Google reviews
- Create SEO-optimized Google Business Updates based on your target keywords
- Create AI images to use on your Google Business updates
- Create service & product descriptions optimized for your local SEO keywords
- Answer questions asked on your Google Business Profile
- Much more!

Grow Your Business with ProfilePro

Whether you're a business owner looking to rank higher on Google or a digital marketing agency working on your client's Google profiles, ProfilePro's user-friendly interface is perfect for you. Simply answer three questions, and let our advanced AI optimize your Google Business Profile in no time.

Global Support and Language Compatibility

ProfilePro is tailored to meet the needs of business profiles worldwide and is fully translated into English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Urdu, Hindi, Tagalog, Dutch, Korean, German, Italian, Arabic, Bengali, Japanese, Punjabi, Norwegian, and Russian.

Get in touch with Merchynt at profilepro@merchynt.com for feature requests or inquiries.

Page Audit Extension gives you a complete breakdown of any webpage’s on-page SEO. Instantly view your title tag, meta description, heading structure, internal links, word count, and more—all with a single click.

But here’s what makes Page Audit different:
We show you exactly how many times your target keyword is used—and where it appears on the page (titles, headings, body, etc.). No more guessing. Just clarity.

Want deeper insights? This extension connects directly with PageAudit.com for full audits, tracking changes over time, and competitor comparisons.

Whether you're doing SEO for clients, auditing your own site, or just want to understand how your content stacks up—Page Audit Extension is your shortcut to better rankings.
Quickly check if Amazon ships to your country with the Does Amazon Ship to... Chrome Extension. Save time and shop smarter.

🌟Shopping on Amazon is convenient, but one frustrating question remains: Does Amazon ship to your country? With this Chrome Extension, you no longer have to guess. This powerful tool quickly lets you know if shipping is available for your favorite products in your location, saving time and energy.

🔮This easy-to-use Chrome Extension is designed for international shoppers who regularly face the hassle of figuring out store delivery options. Whether you’re browsing Lightning Deals or searching for everyday essentials, the  Extension streamlines your shopping experience.

⚡Why Choose this Addon?

➤ Quickly identify product shipping availability for your country.
➤ Save time by avoiding manual research for delivery policies.
➤ Perfect for shoppers worldwide facing shipping restrictions.

✨How the Addon Work?

When browsing the store, not all items are available for international delivery. Many shoppers often start their shopping only to find out at checkout that shipping to their country isn’t an option. With the extension, you can avoid these roadblocks and shop smarter.

💥Easy Setup Instructions

Using the extension is effortless! Follow these simple steps:
1️⃣: Enable Shipping Check by toggling on the feature in the extension toolbar.
2️⃣: Visit marketplace and browse product categories, like Lightning Deals or Best Sellers.
3️⃣: Check product cards for icons indicating if items can ship to your chosen destination.

These steps ensure that you always know upfront whether retailer shipping is available.

👍Features That Make Your Life Easier

Here’s how the Chrome Extension stands out:
▸ Visual Indicators: Product cards display clear icons showing “Ships to your location” or “Won’t ship to your location.”
▸ Global Accessibility: Works for shoppers in multiple regions, covering a vast array of countries.
▸ Seamless Integration: Fully integrated with store’s platform for a smooth browsing experience.
▸ Lightning Fast Results: Instant feedback while you browse products—no extra clicks needed!
▸ Risk-Free Shopping: Avoid last-minute checkout surprises.

☀️Benefits for International Shoppers

Shopping on marketplace while living abroad can be complicated, but this extension eliminates the guesswork. With just one glance, you’ll know whether store delivery is possible for products in your shopping bag.

🔥Platform delivery policies can be unpredictable when it comes to international shipping. This tool simplifies the process for users in countries with limited shipping options.

Who Can Use the Extension?

1️⃣ Travelers wanting items shipped to international locations.
2️⃣ Expats living abroad who shop frequently online.
3️⃣ Online buyers looking for seamless international shipping solutions.
4️⃣ Anyone frustrated by surprises during checkout.

⚡Lightning Deals with the Extension

Are you a fan of Lightning Deals? This Chrome Extension ensures you won’t waste time chasing discounts on products that cannot ship to your country.

❗️Tips for Getting the Most Out of the Extension

Always enable the Shipping Check feature before browsing the store.
Look for clear shipping icons before adding products to your cart.
Use it on major shopping events like Black Friday, Prime Day, or Cyber Monday for stress-free shopping.

📦 How It Works with Shipping

Sometimes, even eligible items aren’t automatically displayed as available for delivery. The Extension solves this issue by analyzing your selected region and highlighting compatibility.

🚀Effortless Browsing

Forget sifting through countless product pages trying to find items marked eligible for international shipping. The extension does all the heavy lifting with zero manual effort.

⚡Delivery Made Simple

No shopper likes the disappointment of finding out their order isn’t eligible for shipping to their country. This tool gives you peace of mind so you can plan purchases without interruptions.

💥Rated 5 Stars by Users

Shoppers worldwide love the simplicity and reliability of the Addon. Whether you’re placing large orders or buying one item, this Chrome Extension ensures clarity in Amazon shipping and delivery.

👍Key Takeaways

➤ Eliminate shipping uncertainty with quick visual indicators.
➤ Maximize your shopping experience without wasting time.
➤ Perfect for both occasional and frequent Amazon users.
➤ No matter where you live, the Chrome Extension makes determining availability simple. Enjoy shopping without the headache of wondering if products can ship to your destination.

A RingCentral extension for CRM platforms

Documentation: https://ringcentral.github.io/rc-unified-crm-extension/

Release notes: https://ringcentral.github.io/rc-unified-crm-extension/release-notes/

The RingCentral App Connect embeds a fully-functional web phone into a set of supported CRM platforms. In addition, the App Connect provides a deep integration with your RingCentral account to automate a number of key functions to help sales people save time and be more efficient. With the App Connect users can easily click any phone number to call that number and send an SMS, synchronize their call history with their CRM platform, schedule meetings, enter custom call disposition notes, among a number of other things. The RingCentral App Connect currently supports the following CRM platforms: Insightly, Redtail, Pipedrive, and Clio. Don't see your CRM in the list? Submit your idea to the RingCentral Ideas portal so that we can add support for it.

Supported CRM platforms: Pipedrive, Insightly, Clio, Redtail, Bullhorn, NetSuite, Google Sheets

Disclaimer: RingCentral Labs is a program that lets RingCentral engineers, platform product managers and other employees share RingCentral apps they've created with the customer community. RingCentral Labs apps are free to use, but are not official products, and should be considered community projects - these apps are not officially tested or documented. For help on any RingCentral Labs app please consult each project's GitHub Issues message boards - RingCentral support is not available for these applications.
